description: Nancy Davolio, a sales representative at Northwind Traders, recently paid $125.50 out of pocket for a client dinner at the Global Food Expo. As the bookkeeper, record this transaction by creating an expense claim for the payer 'Nancy Davolio' with the description 'Client Dinner - Global Food Expo' and the amount $125.50. Use an appropriate expense account such as 'Travel', 'Entertainment', or 'General Expenses'. Ensure the Expense Claims module is enabled to complete the entry.
